description: Map YouTube watch history to unified events timeline
sql: SELECT 'gtakeout' as source, title_url || '_' || time as source_id, time::TIMESTAMP as start_at, NULL as end_at, NULL as duration_min, title, NULL as event_description, NULL as location, CASE WHEN product = 'YouTube Music' THEN 'music' ELSE 'video' END as category, false as all_day, json_object('channel', channel_name, 'channel_url', channel_url, 'video_url', title_url, 'product', product) as metadata FROM gtakeout.youtube_watch_history WHERE time IS NOT NULL
